content: A computer automation agent that handles end-user desktop workflows can be redesigned as a hybrid planning and learning system that blends structured pre-programmed automation blueprints with on-the-fly user-led interaction learning, just like hybrid higher education blends fixed in-person lesson plans with adaptive personalized learning experiences. This design lets the agent reliably handle routine tasks while gradually learning user-specific workarounds for unstructured edge cases that pure automation cannot address.
